formulas.name: 1. Net Cash from Operating Activities
formulas.formula: Net Cash from Operating Activities = Net Profit + Depreciation + Provision for Doubtful Debts + Decrease in Current Assets - Increase in Current Assets - Decrease in Current Liabilities + Increase in Current Liabilities
formulas.variables: Net Profit, Depreciation, Provision for Doubtful Debts, Current Assets, Current Liabilities
formulas.notes: To calculate the net cash generated from operating activities

formulas.name: 2. Net Cash from Investing Activities
formulas.formula: Net Cash from Investing Activities = Purchase of Fixed Assets - Sale of Fixed Assets - Investment in Shares/Debentures + Redemption of Shares/Debentures
formulas.variables: Purchase of Fixed Assets, Sale of Fixed Assets, Investment in Shares/Debentures, Redemption of Shares/Debentures
formulas.notes: To calculate the net cash used in investing activities

formulas.name: 3. Net Cash from Financing Activities
formulas.formula: Net Cash from Financing Activities = Issue of Shares/Debentures - Redemption of Shares/Debentures + Borrowings - Repayment of Borrowings + Interest Paid
formulas.variables: Issue of Shares/Debentures, Redemption of Shares/Debentures, Borrowings, Repayment of Borrowings, Interest Paid
formulas.notes: To calculate the net cash generated from financing activities

formulas.name: 4. Increase in Current Assets
formulas.formula: Increase in Current Assets = Opening Current Assets - Closing Current Assets
formulas.variables: Opening Current Assets, Closing Current Assets
formulas.notes: To calculate the increase in current assets

formulas.name: 5. Decrease in Current Assets
formulas.formula: Decrease in Current Assets = Closing Current Assets - Opening Current Assets
formulas.variables: Opening Current Assets, Closing Current Assets
formulas.notes: To calculate the decrease in current assets

formulas.name: 6. Increase in Current Liabilities
formulas.formula: Increase in Current Liabilities = Closing Current Liabilities - Opening Current Liabilities
formulas.variables: Opening Current Liabilities, Closing Current Liabilities
formulas.notes: To calculate the increase in current liabilities

formulas.name: 7. Decrease in Current Liabilities
formulas.formula: Decrease in Current Liabilities = Opening Current Liabilities - Closing Current Liabilities
formulas.variables: Opening Current Liabilities, Closing Current Liabilities
formulas.notes: To calculate the decrease in current liabilities

formulas.name: 8. Net Change in Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.formula: Net Change in Cash and Cash Equivalents = Net Cash from Operating Activities + Net Cash from Investing Activities + Net Cash from Financing Activities
formulas.variables: Net Cash from Operating Activities, Net Cash from Investing Activities, Net Cash from Financing Activities
formulas.notes: To calculate the net change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.name: 9. Opening Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.formula: Opening Cash and Cash Equivalents = Previous Year's Closing Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.variables: Previous Year's Closing Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.notes: To determine the opening cash and cash equivalents

formulas.name: 10. Closing Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.formula: Closing Cash and Cash Equivalents = Opening Cash and Cash Equivalents + Net Change in Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.variables: Opening Cash and Cash Equivalents, Net Change in Cash and Cash Equivalents
formulas.notes: To calculate the closing cash and cash equivalents
